---
title: "Presentations and Reports"
description: "Year-sorted catalog of OPALX presentations, design reports, and bug investigations."
audience: user
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

This catalog provides a stable text page for every OPALX report or
presentation. The page records what the document covers and links to the
original file in `opalx-documents`. Entries are sorted by year and then by date,
with the newest first.

## 2026

| Date | Entry | Kind | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-07-14 | [CUDA extended-lambda linkage bug](2026/cuda-extended-lambda-linkage-bug.qmd) | Bug investigation | Resolved with workaround |
| 2026-04-30 | [OpalElement layout proposal](2026/opal-element-layout-proposal.qmd) | Design report | Experimental |
| 2026-04-06 | [OPALX overview](2026/opalx-overview.qmd) | Architecture presentation | Current |

## Add an entry

Create a page under `resources/reports/YYYY/`, add it to this year-sorted list,
and add the page to the Presentations and Reports chapters in `_quarto.yml`.
Put the original PDF or presentation in the matching category and year in
`opalx-documents`, then link it through `documents-base-url`. The full process
and link template are in the
[Documentation Workflow](../../developer-guide/documentation-workflow.qmd).

Supporting datasets and examples are linked from the manual page that explains
how they are used rather than being listed as reports.
